meta.title: Vila Irena · Stone Country House with Pool · Bruška, Dalmatia
meta.description: Stone villa with a private pool in Bruška near Zadar — two Dalmatian stone houses on a 1,600 m² walled estate. Sleeps 8, pets welcome.

hero.title: A stone hideaway under the Dalmatian sun
hero.subtitle: Two traditional stone houses, a private pool and 1,600 m² of walled-in peace, an easy drive from Zadar, the beaches and four national parks.

about.title: Two stone houses, one Dalmatian story
about.p1: Vila Irena is made of two traditional Dalmatian stone houses on a fully fenced 1,600 m² estate. Inside, stone and wood are combined with care to keep the spirit of old Dalmatia: 90 m² of living space with two bedrooms, a living room, a dining room, a fully equipped kitchen and two bathrooms.
about.p2: Outside, the day belongs to the seasonal 32 m² pool, the sun loungers, the children's playground and a large covered barbecue with its own outdoor dining table. Dry stone walls, olive trees and an organic garden surround it all, reserved exclusively for guests.
about.hostNote: Your hosts live next door and guard your privacy, though they are famous for another habit: welcoming guests with homegrown fruit, fresh eggs and vegetables from their own garden.

pool.title: Private 32 m² pool
pool.desc: Seasonal, open April through October, with sun loungers.

bbq.title: Covered barbecue
bbq.desc: A large grill area with its own outdoor dining table.

kitchen.title: Full kitchen
kitchen.desc: Fully equipped, with dishwasher and everything for home cooking.

ac.desc: Cool rooms after a day in the Dalmatian sun.

parking.desc: Private parking inside the fenced property.

pets.desc: Your four-legged family travels with you.

playground.desc: A safe, fenced place for kids to roam free.

family.title: Family ready
family.desc: Baby crib and high chair included, washer on site.

reviews.title: Rated 5.0 by the people who stayed
reviews.summary: Based on 23 Airbnb reviews · Guest favourite

items.name: Carolin
items.text: It was even more beautiful than the photos. Everything is arranged with so much love, very clean and comfortable. The hosts were incredibly warm, and the barbecue evening they organised for us was special. If you are looking for a calm, relaxing family holiday, this is the place.

items.name: Tobias
items.text: The owners were very kind. On arrival a tray full of small sandwiches was waiting for us. The pool is clean and invites you to swim at any time, and the covered barbecue area with its big dining table impressed us most. We would choose Bruška again.

location.title: The quiet side of Dalmatia
location.description: Bruška sits in the Zadar hinterland, between dry stone walls and olive groves, far from the coastal crowds yet close enough for a swim. The beaches of Zadar, the islands and four national parks are all within an easy drive.
location.mapNote: The map loads from Google Maps only after you click.

attractions.title: Asseria
attractions.desc: The quiet ruins of a Roman city, just down the road near Benkovac.

attractions.title: Kličevica waterfalls
attractions.desc: A hidden river canyon with waterfalls for hot summer days.

attractions.title: Bruška–Medviđa heritage road
attractions.desc: A themed walking road through the traditions of the hinterland.

attractions.title: Benkovac market
attractions.desc: An authentic Dalmatian market morning, the way it used to be.

attractions.title: National parks
attractions.desc: Krka, Plitvice, Paklenica and Kornati, all reachable as day trips.

attractions.title: Zadar & the coast
attractions.desc: Roman forum, the Sea Organ and the beaches of the riviera.

booking.title: Check availability
booking.subtitle: Pick your dates, send an inquiry, and your host will confirm personally by email, usually within a few hours. No online payment, no booking fees.
booking.availabilityNote: The calendar is just for choosing your dates — we confirm availability personally by email after your inquiry.

form.title: Send a booking inquiry
form.name: Full name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us anything we should know: arrival time, kids, pets…
form.datesRequired: Select your dates in the calendar above first.
form.consent: I agree that my data is used to answer this inquiry, as described in the {privacyLink}.
form.errorEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
form.errorRateLimited: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
form.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

success.title: Inquiry sent
success.body: Thank you! Your inquiry is on its way. You will hear back by email, usually within a few hours and always within 24.

items.q: What are the check-in and check-out times?
items.a: Check-in is between 15:00 and 23:00, check-out by 10:00. If you need different times, mention it in your inquiry and we will do our best.
The 32 m² pool is seasonal and open from 1 April to 31 October.
Yes, pets are welcome. Just let us know in your inquiry who is coming along.

items.q: How does booking work? Do I pay online?
items.a: You send an inquiry with your dates, and your host confirms availability and payment details personally by email. There is no online payment on this website and no booking fees.

items.q: Does the calendar show live availability?
items.a: No — the calendar is just for choosing your dates. Every inquiry is confirmed personally by the host before anything is final.

Bruška is in the Zadar hinterland, easiest to reach by car. Zadar airport is about a 40-minute drive, and we will send exact directions with your confirmation. Airport transfers and trips can be arranged on request.

footer.tagline: Two stone houses, a pool and 1,600 m² of Dalmatian peace. Vila Irena is a traditional stone villa with a private pool in Bruška, the Zadar hinterland: a calm holiday for families and groups of up to 8 guests, a short drive from the Krka, Plitvice and Kornati national parks and the Adriatic beaches.
footer.contactNote: The fastest way to reach us is the inquiry form above.

sections.p: When you send a booking inquiry we collect the data you enter in the form: your name, email address, phone number if provided, the number of guests, your travel dates and your message.
The data is used for one purpose only: to answer your inquiry and arrange your stay. We do not send newsletters, we do not sell or share your data with third parties for marketing.
Your inquiry is delivered to the host's email inbox through a transactional email service. It is not stored in any database by this website.
Inquiry emails are kept as long as needed to arrange and document your stay, and deleted afterwards on request.
Under the GDPR you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by replying to any email from us.
The data controller is Mario Božina (Vila Irena, Bruška, Croatia). For any data request — access, correction or deletion — contact bozina.marijo@gmail.com.
